objective: Inventory Cloudflare Pages Direct Upload projects for epic #467, classify gate adoption state, and create issue-backed downstream adoption follow-ups for uncovered governed consumer repos.
scope_boundary: Issue #472 owns only inventory tooling, no-secret inventory evidence, governance docs/progress updates, and issue-backed follow-up routing for uncovered Direct Upload consumers.
No Cloudflare DNS/project setting changes are authorized.
No downstream repository file writes are authorized; downstream adoption work is routed to HealthcarePlatform#1478 and ai-integration-services#1217.
out_of_scope: Implementing HealthcarePlatform or AIS Pages gate adoption.
Changing Cloudflare DNS or switching a Pages project from Direct Upload to Git Provider.
Committing Cloudflare token values, account secrets, generated env files, bearer headers, or dashboard-private data.
research_summary: The Cloudflare Pages API inventory on 2026-04-21 identified five Pages projects with no Git provider configured: seek-and-ponder, hldpro-dashboard, hldpro-marketing, hldpro-pwa, and hldpro-reseller. Seek is covered by the first-consumer adoption lane. HealthcarePlatform owns hldpro-dashboard and needs adoption via issue #1478. ai-integration-services owns hldpro-marketing, hldpro-pwa, and hldpro-reseller and needs adoption via issue #1217.

sprints.name: Direct Upload Pages inventory rollout
sprints.goal: Make Direct Upload deploy ownership visible and route uncovered governed consumers to issue-backed adoption follow-ups.
tasks: Add scripts/pages-deploy/inventory_direct_upload_projects.py to convert Cloudflare Pages API project data into a no-secret governed inventory.
Add focused tests for direct-upload classification, missing expected projects, and offline JSON rendering.
Commit no-secret raw inventory JSON/Markdown for the five #472 projects.
Update the Cloudflare external services runbook and feature/progress registries with ownership, gate status, and follow-up issue links.
Open downstream follow-up issues for uncovered governed consumers: HealthcarePlatform#1478 and ai-integration-services#1217.
Validate execution scope, handoff package, closeout, inventory JSON, focused tests, provisioning evidence safety, diff hygiene, and Local CI Gate.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory includes seek-and-ponder, hldpro-dashboard, hldpro-marketing, hldpro-pwa, and hldpro-reseller.
Each project records domains, Git provider status, owning repo, current deploy path, whether the governance gate exists, and disposition.
Covered and uncovered projects have explicit issue-backed disposition.
No Cloudflare token values or generated env secrets are committed.
Local deterministic validation and GitHub checks pass before #472 closes.

specialist_reviews.focus: Map hldpro-dashboard, hldpro-marketing, hldpro-pwa, and hldpro-reseller to local repository ownership and deployment workflow evidence.
specialist_reviews.summary: HealthcarePlatform owns hldpro-dashboard; ai-integration-services owns hldpro-marketing, hldpro-pwa, and hldpro-reseller. Local deployment hashes were not present locally, so workflow/docs ownership evidence is authoritative for this inventory slice.

specialist_reviews.focus: Identify minimal issue #472 file set, validators, and whether to extend existing tooling instead of adding unrelated registry complexity.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended adding a dedicated Pages inventory script, tests, runbook visibility, validation/closeout artifacts, and keeping governed_repos schema unchanged for this inventory closeout.

alternate_model_review.summary: Issue #472 implements the pre-approved Sprint 5 inventory slice from epic #467 without new architecture or standards changes.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #472 may add Pages inventory tooling/tests, no-secret inventory artifacts, governance docs/progress updates, and issue-owned Stage 6 artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run validation, open PR, wait for checks, merge, close #472, then close parent epic #467 if all children remain closed.

material_deviation_rules: If additional Direct Upload projects are discovered, add them to the inventory and create issue-backed disposition before closing #472.
If Cloudflare API output includes token values, bearer headers, generated env contents, or dashboard-private data, redact before committing and record only safe metadata.
If downstream adoption requires repo file edits, stop and route that work through the downstream issue lane instead of expanding #472.
